response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack and systems experience across many languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++) but lacks the core required expertise for this role: deep Java/Kotlin/JVM work, Spring ecosystem experience, and IDE internals. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) and Kotlin/Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus are not mentioned. The closest IDE-adjacent work is NI LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. Skill mismatch is significant for a Mid-Senior IDE/JVM tooling role.
strengths: Strong systems and low-latency background (DLang microservices at Dunnhumby)
Proven craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship
Long tenure building complex, extensible products (GISCollective, custom test runner)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus or enterprise Java framework experience
Kotlin not mentioned anywhere; Java exposure is limited and dated
No IDE internals or language tooling experience relevant to JVM ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Strong software craftsmanship and complex-systems track record
